user.title: Too Good To Go
user.description: Enter your Too Good To Go email address. You'll receive an email with a PIN code.

pin.title: Enter PIN Code
pin.description:
A PIN code has been sent to **{email}**.

Check your email and enter the 6-digit PIN below.

options.title: Update interval
options.description: How often should Home Assistant check for available bags?

error.invalid_pin: Invalid PIN code. Please check your email and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Too Good To Go. Check your internet connection and email address.
error.missing_dependency: The tgtg package is not installed. Restart Home Assistant and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Too Good To Go account is already configured.
